units.name: Marketing & Communications
units.keyRisk: Reputational damage from poor stakeholder communication

units.name: Human Resources & Development
units.keyRisk: Critical skills vacancy and talent retention

units.name: Governance
units.keyRisk: Board governance failures and King IV non-compliance

units.name: Project Management Office
units.keyRisk: Project delivery failures and cost overruns

units.name: ETQA
units.keyRisk: Quality assurance failures and accreditation risk

cases.description: Contract awarded without following SCM prescripts — tender process bypassed
Expenditure incurred in excess of approved budget vote without National Treasury approval
Cancellation penalties paid on venue bookings due to poor planning and last-minute event cancellations
Service provider appointed without valid tax clearance certificate in contravention of PFMA
Training expenditure approved outside approved budget without Accounting Authority approval
Interest and penalties incurred due to late payment of suppliers in contravention of 30-day payment policy
Deviation from competitive bidding process without Accounting Authority approval

risks.title: Limited and Undiversified Financial Resources
risks.description: Over-reliance on levy income with insufficient diversification into grants, partnerships, and commercial revenue streams threatens long-term financial sustainability.
risks.treatmentAction: Develop non-levy revenue strategy and diversify funding streams.
risks.cause: Structural dependence on SARS levy collection mechanism
risks.consequence: Inability to sustain operations if levy income declines

risks.title: Threat to Business Continuity
risks.description: Critical LGSETA services may be disrupted due to ICT outages, office accommodation instability, supplier failure or data loss.
risks.treatmentAction: Update BCM plans and conduct full BIA and DR testing.
risks.cause: Inadequate BCM planning and untested disaster recovery

risks.title: Strategic Performance Underachievement
risks.description: LGSETA may fail to achieve planned APP targets due to delayed implementation, weak monitoring or poor coordination.
risks.treatmentAction: Strengthen quarterly APP monitoring and early warning escalation.
risks.cause: Weak monitoring and coordination across divisions
risks.consequence: Missed targets and adverse AGSA findings

risks.title: Erosion of Organisational Reputation
risks.description: Negative public perception, adverse audit outcomes, and stakeholder dissatisfaction risk eroding LGSETA credibility.
risks.treatmentAction: Implement stakeholder engagement strategy and communication plan.
risks.cause: Poor communication and adverse audit findings
risks.consequence: Loss of stakeholder confidence and funding

risks.title: Threat to Information Security
risks.description: LGSETA systems face increasing cybersecurity threats including ransomware, data breaches and phishing attacks.
risks.treatmentAction: Deploy cybersecurity framework and conduct penetration testing.
risks.cause: Outdated ICT infrastructure and insufficient security controls
risks.consequence: Data breach, POPIA penalties, and reputational damage

risks.title: Administrative Budget Overrun
risks.description: LGSETA continues exceeding approved administrative budgets while core mandate expenditure remains underspent.
risks.treatmentAction: Implement monthly budget control reviews and cost containment measures.
risks.cause: Weak budget controls and inadequate expenditure monitoring
risks.consequence: Qualified audit opinion and PFMA violations

risks.title: Business Continuity Disruption
risks.description: Critical LGSETA services may be disrupted due to ICT outages, accommodation instability or supplier failure.
risks.treatmentAction: Update BCM plans, conduct BIA and test disaster recovery.
risks.consequence: Service disruption affecting learners and municipalities

risks.title: Non-Compliance with Key Legislation
risks.description: LGSETA faces risk of non-compliance with PFMA, SDL Act, POPIA, and DHET directives.
risks.treatmentAction: Develop compliance register and implement monitoring framework.
risks.cause: Inadequate compliance monitoring and staff awareness
risks.consequence: Regulatory penalties and adverse audit outcomes

risks.title: Critical Skills Vacancy and Talent Retention
risks.description: LGSETA faces high vacancy rates in critical positions impacting service delivery and institutional knowledge retention.
risks.treatmentAction: Implement retention strategy and fill critical vacancies within 90 days.
risks.cause: Uncompetitive remuneration and limited career growth
risks.consequence: Service delivery failures and institutional knowledge loss

risks.title: SCM Procurement Irregularities
risks.description: Supply chain management processes expose LGSETA to irregular expenditure, tender manipulation and PFMA violations.
risks.treatmentAction: Strengthen SCM oversight and implement e-procurement system.
risks.cause: Weak SCM controls and inadequate oversight
risks.consequence: Irregular expenditure, AGSA findings and reputational damage

opportunityRisks.title: Municipal Skills Intelligence Hub
opportunityRisks.description: Transform LGSETA data infrastructure into a real-time municipal skills intelligence platform serving all 257 municipalities.
opportunityRisks.action: Develop platform architecture and pilot with 3 metropolitan municipalities.

opportunityRisks.title: AI Learner Placement Platform
opportunityRisks.description: Deploy AI-powered matching system to connect qualified learners with municipal employment opportunities.
opportunityRisks.action: Pilot with 3 municipalities and refine matching algorithm.

opportunityRisks.title: PPP Provincial Assessment Centre Network
opportunityRisks.description: Establish public-private partnership to create provincial assessment centres reducing cost and improving access.
opportunityRisks.action: Expand existing partnerships to 4 additional provinces.

opportunityRisks.title: Municipal Finance Skills Academy
opportunityRisks.description: Establish a dedicated academy for municipal finance officials addressing critical CFO pipeline shortage.
opportunityRisks.action: Co-design curriculum with National Treasury and launch pilot cohort.

emergingRisks.title: Geopolitical Instability Impact on Municipal Funding
emergingRisks.description: Global geopolitical shifts and domestic coalition instability may result in severe reduction in available funding.
emergingRisks.potentialImpact: Severe reduction in available funding for skills development programmes

emergingRisks.title: Rapid AI Adoption in Skills Assessment
emergingRisks.description: Accelerated AI deployment may render current assessment methodologies obsolete.
emergingRisks.potentialImpact: Need for complete overhaul of quality assurance and assessment frameworks

emergingRisks.title: Climate Change Impact on Municipal Service Delivery
emergingRisks.description: Increasing climate events disrupting municipal operations creating demand for climate resilience skills.
emergingRisks.potentialImpact: Disruption to physical training and assessment centre operations

emergingRisks.title: New Skills Development Legislation
emergingRisks.description: Proposed amendments to SDL Act and SETAs rationalisation may fundamentally alter LGSETA mandate.
emergingRisks.potentialImpact: Mandatory restructuring of grant allocation and levy disbursement model

treatmentActions.action: Implement monthly APP risk review meetings with early-warning escalation protocol.
Introduce administrative budget exception reporting and cost containment tracking dashboard.
Deploy cybersecurity framework including penetration testing and staff awareness programme.
Update BCM plans, conduct BIA, test disaster recovery and confirm office accommodation.
Develop compliance universe register and implement quarterly compliance monitoring reports.
Develop non-levy revenue diversification strategy with 3-year implementation roadmap.
Implement e-procurement system and strengthen SCM oversight committee.

appetiteDashboard.toleranceThreshold: RTO less than 4 hours for critical systems
Zero unresolved fraud cases beyond 90 days

bia.description: Monthly processing of salaries and benefits for all LGSETA staff
bia.continuityStrategy: Manual payroll calculation with CFO approval

bia.description: Disbursement of discretionary and mandatory grants to training providers and employers
bia.mbco: Emergency payments for critical learners only
bia.continuityStrategy: Manual payment request with dual authorization

bia.description: Core ICT infrastructure supporting all LGSETA operations including email, network and applications
bia.continuityStrategy: Azure cloud failover with secondary ISP

bia.description: Registration of learners, quality assurance, certification and SAQA reporting
bia.mbco: Manual registration for new intakes only

bia.description: Monthly, quarterly and annual financial reporting to DHET, NT and AGSA

criticalProcesses.name: Payroll Processing
criticalProcesses.alternateProcess: Manual payroll calculation with CFO approval

criticalProcesses.name: Grant Disbursement
criticalProcesses.alternateProcess: Manual payment request with dual authorization

bcPlans.name: Financial Services BCP
bcPlans.recoveryStrategy: Cloud-based failover with manual backup procedures
bcPlans.alternateWork: Remote work via VPN with hardcopy fallback

bcPlans.name: Operations & Grants BCP
bcPlans.recoveryStrategy: Manual processing with paper-based approval chain
gaps: Key personnel contact list not updated

bcPlans.name: ICT Services BCP
bcPlans.recoveryStrategy: Azure cloud failover with secondary ISP
bcPlans.alternateWork: Mobile data backup with remote access

bcPlans.name: Human Resources BCP
bcPlans.recoveryStrategy: Manual HR processes with paper records
bcPlans.alternateWork: Work from home with manual tracking

drPlans.keyRisk: Full failover took 6.5 hours vs 4 hour RTO
LMS vendor dependency for restoration support
Restoration failed during last test — database corruption
Microsoft service outage beyond LGSETA control

drPlans.drStrategy: Secondary ISP failover with mobile data backup
drPlans.keyRisk: Review overdue — ISP contract not renewed

bcmRisks.title: Inadequate Business Continuity Planning
bcmRisks.cause: Outdated BCM plans not regularly reviewed or tested
bcmRisks.consequence: Inability to maintain critical services during disruption
bcmRisks.treatmentAction: Update all BCM plans by Q3 2026

bcmRisks.title: Failure to Recover Within Approved RTOs
bcmRisks.cause: ICT infrastructure not adequately configured for rapid failover
bcmRisks.consequence: Extended downtime breaching PFMA service delivery obligations
bcmRisks.controls: DR plans, cloud backup, DR testing
bcmRisks.treatmentAction: Complete DR infrastructure upgrade and retest

bcmRisks.title: Loss of Critical Business Records
bcmRisks.cause: Inadequate backup and records management controls
bcmRisks.consequence: Inability to meet PFMA, POPIA and AGSA audit requirements
bcmRisks.treatmentAction: Implement offsite records vault and verify EDRMS backup

bcmRisks.title: Third-Party Service Disruption
bcmRisks.cause: Over-reliance on single suppliers without continuity provisions
bcmRisks.consequence: Grant disbursement and ICT services disrupted without recovery option
bcmRisks.controls: Vendor contracts, SLA monitoring, third-party risk register
bcmRisks.treatmentAction: Enforce BCM requirements in all critical vendor contracts

bcmRisks.title: Cyber Incident Causing Operational Disruption
bcmRisks.cause: Ransomware or data breach disabling core systems
bcmRisks.consequence: Complete operational shutdown affecting all LGSETA services
bcmRisks.treatmentAction: Deploy cyber incident response plan linked to BCM

bcmRisks.title: Office Accommodation Disruption
bcmRisks.cause: Loss of access to head office due to fire, flooding or eviction
bcmRisks.consequence: Inability to operate from primary location
bcmRisks.controls: Alternate site arrangement, remote work policy
bcmRisks.treatmentAction: Secure formal alternate site agreement and test occupation

bcmRisks.title: Inadequate BCM Testing and Exercising
bcmRisks.cause: Insufficient frequency and scope of BCM tests
bcmRisks.consequence: Untested plans fail during actual disruption
bcmRisks.treatmentAction: Complete all outstanding BCM tests by Q3 2026

incidents.title: Email System Outage
incidents.impact: Delayed approvals and external communications for half a day
incidents.actionsTaken: Microsoft support engaged, server patch rolled back
incidents.lessonsLearned: Patch testing in UAT required before production

incidents.title: Network Connectivity Failure — Gauteng Office
incidents.impact: Learner registrations delayed by one day in Gauteng
incidents.actionsTaken: Mobile data hotspot deployed, ISP escalated
incidents.lessonsLearned: Secondary ISP failover required for all provincial offices

incidents.title: Grants Management System Unavailability
incidents.impact: R2.1M in grant payments delayed — 14 training providers affected
incidents.actionsTaken: Database restoration from backup, vendor emergency support
incidents.lessonsLearned: Pre-upgrade backups mandatory; rollback procedure must be tested

findings: Backup restoration took longer than expected
Communication tree not up to date
Grant disbursement could not operate remotely
correctiveActions: Configure remote access for all staff

bcmKRIs.indicator: Critical Systems with Tested DR Plans

treatmentActions.finding: Grant disbursement failover failed during simulation
DR site failover RTO exceeded by 2.5 hours
Alternate office site not ready for occupation
Staff remote access not configured for all users
BCP-002 and BCP-004 overdue for review
Cyber incident response plan not linked to BCM
Critical supplier contracts lack BCM requirements
